title: Lumberjacking !
description: A new way of processing logs into planks, and different log strength fully customizable !
body:
![Chopping block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fb11eabdd47a1940c21692a0d9fda69d589330e_0.webp)

This mod adds a new mechanic the chopping block !
This will be needed in order to get planks from logs instead of magicaly turning raw wood into planks.

# Features
- **Chopping blocks of all wood types**
- **Chop logs into planks !**
  - _Variable chop amount (depends on the recipe, can be customized)_
  - _Variable tool wearness (depends on the recipe, can be customized)_
- **New recipes for most woodbased blocks**
- **Different wood strengh (for exemple oak will be way harder than birch)**
- **REI support included**

# Customization
- **Fully customizable, most of the features this mod adds can be disabled or edited via the config file**
- **Custom crafts can be made via DataPack**
